## Tech Stack

| Category | Details |
| :--- | :--- |
| **IDE** | [Antigravity](https://antigravity.google/) |
| **Core Stack** | [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/), [TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) |
| **AI - Code Generation** | [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/app), [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/), [v0](https://v0.app/) |
| **AI - Image Generation** | [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/app), [Nero AI](https://ai.nero.com/image-sharpener) (image sharpener), [Airbrush](https://airbrush.com/image-upscaler) (image sharpener), [Photoroom](https://www.photoroom.com/tools/background-remover) (background remover) |
| **AI - Video Generation** | [DomoAI](https://www.domoai.app/), [Wink](https://wink.ai/) (video enhancement) |
| **UI & Animation** | [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com/), [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/), [Motion](https://motion.dev/) |
| **Image Processing** | [Paint.NET](https://www.getpaint.net/), [FreeConvert](https://www.freeconvert.com/image-compressor) (image compression), [FreeConvert](https://www.freeconvert.com/webp-converter) (png to webp), [cloudconvert](https://cloudconvert.com/png-to-webp) (png to webp) |
| **Video Processing** | [FreeConvert](https://www.freeconvert.com/video-compressor) |
| **External Brand Icons**| [Icons8](https://icons8.com) |
